## Type

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behavior diff
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling / CI / deps
- [ ] security — vulnerability or hardening
